entities: EmpiresX; Empires Consulting Corp.; Emerson Pires; Flavio Goncalves; Joshua Nicholas
reported_metric: Solicited commodity pool participants through website, videos, social media, calls, and messages
market_health_signal: Marketing channels created a trading-performance narrative

reported_metric: Promoted daily profits of one percent supposedly earned by a trading bot or manual trading
At least 41.6 million USD accepted and pooled from more than 12500 individuals
market_health_signal: Large inflows should be matched against actual brokerage deposits and trading records

reported_metric: Account page and mimicked platform website allegedly made customers believe funds were actively traded
market_health_signal: Fabricated dashboards can function as synthetic market data

reported_metric: Defendants stopped honoring participant withdrawal requests
market_health_signal: Exit friction is a late-stage signal that displayed profits may be fabricated

reported_metric: DOJ said the scheme took in approximately 100 million USD from investors and used a purported trading bot and guaranteed returns
market_health_signal: Plea-release facts support the false-performance pattern

reported_metric: More than 32 million USD disgorgement and 96 million USD penalties against Pires and Goncalves; 289000 USD disgorgement and 867000 USD penalties against Nicholas
market_health_signal: Regulatory resolution confirms fake trading-performance risk and market bans
